Bash(python -c "
import re, sys
sys.stdout = open\(sys.stdout.fileno\(\), mode='w', encoding='utf-8', buffering=1\)
with open\('E:/Fotopzia/fotopzia/Contrato_Fotopzia.pdf', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)
texts = re.findall\(rb'BT\(.+?\)ET', data, re.DOTALL\)
result = []
for t in texts:
    parts = re.findall\(rb'\\\(\([^\)]*\)\\\)', t\)
    for p in parts:
        try:
            result.append\(p.decode\('latin-1'\)\)
        except:
            pass
print\(' '.join\(result\)[:10000]\)
")
